title: Fix attachment embedding in history ingest

log.context: Fix attachment embedding in history ingest

Here is a summary of what was done:

**Files changed:**
- `/mnt/data/scripts/history-ingest.py` -- Added attachment detection and vision-based description to the ingest pipeline. The `extract_from_channel_tag` function now captures `attachment_count` and `attachments` metadata from channel XML tags. New functions handle: parsing attachment metadata, fetching actual URLs from Discord API, downloading images, and describing them with gpt-4o-mini vision (low detail mode to keep costs minimal).
